title: GasConsumption schema
description: Gas consumption measurements, including meter readings, operating conditions, energy content and gas quality.

address.description: Property. Address associated with the measurement location. Model:'https://schema.org/address'.

addressLocality.description: Property. The locality, which must correspond to the municipality. Model:'https://schema.org/addressLocality'.

addressRegion.description: Property. The NUTS 2 region in which the locality is located. Model:'https://schema.org/addressRegion'.

district.description: Property. The administrative district in which the locality is located.

type.description: Property. NGSI entity type. It has to be GasConsumption.

alternateName.description: Property. Alternate name for the measurement area. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

areaServed.description: Property. Geographic area where the service is provided. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

calorificValue.description: Property. Calorific value of the gas, normally expressed in megajoules per cubic metre. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

conversionFactor.description: Property. Factor used to convert working volume to standard conditions. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

correctedVolume.description: Property. Gas volume corrected to standard conditions. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

dailyConsumption.description: Property. Gas consumption for the current day. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

dataProvider.description: Property. Identifier of the data provider. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

dateCreated.description: Property. Entity creation date and time in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

dateEnergyMeteringStarted.description: Property. Date and time at which energy metering started, in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

dateModified.description: Property. Date and time of the latest entity modification in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

dateObserved.description: Property. Date and time of the observation in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

energyContent.description: Property. Total energy contained in the measured gas volume, normally expressed in megajoules. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

gasQuality.description: Property. Gas composition percentages by volume. Model:'https://schema.org/StructuredValue'.

gasType.description: Property. Type of gas being measured, such as natural gas, LPG or biogas. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

lastMaintenanceDate.description: Property. Date of the latest meter maintenance in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

meterStatus.description: Property. Current operational status of the gas meter. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

meterType.description: Property. Type of gas meter, such as mechanical, electronic or smart meter. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

monthlyConsumption.description: Property. Gas consumption for the current month. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

name.description: Property. Name of the object. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

nextCalibrationDate.description: Property. Next scheduled meter calibration date in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

pressure.description: Property. Gas pressure at the measurement point, normally expressed in millibars. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

temperature.description: Property. Gas temperature at the measurement point, normally expressed in degrees Celsius. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

totalConsumption.description: Property. Total accumulated gas consumption since meter installation. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

uncorrectedVolume.description: Property. Gas volume at working conditions. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

volumeFlowRate.description: Property. Current volumetric gas flow rate. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

yearlyConsumption.description: Property. Gas consumption for the current year. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.
